selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):

response_raw: {"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","opinion":"To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a solid understanding of the sources and types of false information that are likely to be shared. This can include misinformation, disinformation, and propaganda. Once you have identified these types of content, you can take steps to verify their accuracy through fact-checking sources and to flag or report them as false. Additionally, it is important to be mindful of your own biases and to approach social media with a critical eye, questioning information that seems too good (or bad) to be true. By taking these measures, you can help to create a safer and more informative online environment for yourself and others.","reasoning_summary":"To manage and deal with fake content on social media, identify sources of false information, verify accuracy through fact-checking, flag or report false content, be mindful of biases, and approach social media critically.","tone":"informative","citations":["<source name or org>"]}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a solid understanding of the sources and types of false information that are likely to be shared. This can include misinformation, disinformation, and propaganda. Once you have identified these types of content, you can take steps to verify their accuracy through fact-checking sources and to flag or report them as false. Additionally, it is important to be mindful of your own biases and to approach social media with a critical eye, questioning information that seems too good (or bad) to be true. By taking these measures, you can help to create a safer and more informative online environment for yourself and others.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, identify sources of false information, verify accuracy through fact-checking, flag or report false content, be mindful of biases, and approach social media critically.
